articles.title: Lost iPhone at Rochdale Tram Stop: Appeal for Information
articles.excerpt: A woman has appealed for help after losing her daughter's iPhone at a tram stop in Rochdale. The phone, in a white polka dot case, was misplaced around 3:40 PM today.
articles.content_html:
A woman has appealed for help after losing her daughter's iPhone at a tram stop in Rochdale. The phone, which is white and has a polka dot case, was misplaced around 3:40 PM today.

The woman stated that the phone was a birthday present for her daughter, who received it just yesterday. She is hopeful that someone may have found it and can return it.

Anyone who has information regarding the lost phone is encouraged to come forward. The woman expressed her gratitude in advance for any assistance.

The incident occurred at the tram stop facing the bus depot, and the woman is eager to recover the phone as it holds sentimental value.

articles.title: Lift Out of Service at Central Park Tram Stop
articles.excerpt: The lift at Central Park tram stop towards Rochdale is currently out of service, affecting access for passengers.
articles.content_html:
A lift at Central Park tram stop, which serves passengers travelling towards Rochdale via Oldham, is currently out of service. The disruption began on Wednesday, 15 July, at 7:38pm and will continue until further notice.

Customers travelling towards Oldham can access the Manchester bound platform via lift from The Gateway and use the track crossing to reach the Oldham bound platform. This arrangement is intended to provide step-free access despite the lift's unavailability.

Transport for Greater Manchester has apologised for any inconvenience caused by this disruption. They have advised passengers to plan their journeys accordingly and seek alternative routes if necessary.

Further updates will be provided as the situation develops. For more information, visit the Transport for Greater Manchester website.

articles.title: Arrival Predictions for 450-Rochdale Bus on Egremont Road
articles.excerpt: The 450-Rochdale bus service on Egremont Road is set to be integrated into the Manchester Bee Network, with arrival predictions now available.
articles.content_html:
The 450-Rochdale bus service operating on Egremont Road will soon be integrated into the Manchester Bee Network. This development aims to enhance public transport connectivity in the region.

Arrival predictions for the 450-Rochdale service are now accessible, providing passengers with updated information on bus timings.

The Manchester Bee Network is designed to improve transport links across Greater Manchester, making it easier for residents to navigate the area.

Further details regarding the implementation of the Manchester Bee Network and its impact on local transport services will be announced in due course.

articles.title: Northern Rail Services Continue at Castleton Station
articles.excerpt: Northern Rail services are operating as normal at Castleton railway station in Rochdale, following recent video footage showcasing various train classes passing through the station.
articles.content_html:
Northern Rail services are operating as normal at Castleton railway station in Rochdale. Recent video footage has captured several train classes, including the Class 150, Class 153, Class 156, and Class 158, passing through the station.

The videos, published on YouTube, highlight the activity at Castleton station, showcasing the different types of trains that serve the area. The footage dates back to October 2018, providing a glimpse into the station's operations during that time.

Castleton railway station is an important stop on the Northern Rail network, connecting passengers to various destinations across the region. The station continues to play a vital role in local transport, facilitating travel for residents and visitors alike.

articles.title: New Pathway Surfaced in Resin Bound Mulch in Norden, Rochdale
articles.excerpt: A new pathway surfaced in resin bound mulch has been completed in Norden, Rochdale, enhancing local outdoor spaces.
articles.content_html:
A new pathway surfaced in resin bound mulch has been completed in Norden, Rochdale. The project aims to improve accessibility and aesthetics in the area, providing a durable surface for pedestrians.

The resin bound mulch is designed to offer a smooth and safe walking experience, making it suitable for all users, including those with mobility challenges.

Local residents may benefit from the enhanced outdoor space, which could encourage more walking and outdoor activities in the community.

The completion of this pathway is part of ongoing efforts to upgrade public spaces in Rochdale, contributing to the overall improvement of the local environment.

articles.title: Reduced Tram Service on Oldham/Rochdale Line Until August 2
articles.excerpt: Tram services on the Oldham/Rochdale line will operate a reduced schedule until August 2, with replacement buses available for passengers.
articles.content_html:
A notice has been issued regarding tram services on the Oldham/Rochdale line. Until Sunday, August 2, trams will run a reduced service, operating only between Rochdale Town Centre and Exchange Square.

Passengers are advised that replacement buses will be available to assist with completing journeys during this period. This change may affect travel plans for those relying on this route.

The reduced service is expected to remain in place until the specified date, and passengers should plan accordingly. Further updates may be provided as the situation develops.

Anyone with questions about the service changes can contact the relevant transport authorities for more information.

articles.title: New Bus Service Links Port Talbot and Rochdale
articles.excerpt: A new bus service connecting Port Talbot and Rochdale has been launched, offering various schedules and prices for commuters.
articles.content_html:
A new bus service has been introduced, connecting Port Talbot and Rochdale. This service aims to provide convenient travel options for residents and visitors between the two locations.

The schedule includes multiple departures throughout the day, catering to different travel needs. Prices vary depending on the time of travel and ticket type.

This development is expected to enhance transport links for those commuting for work or leisure, making it easier to access services and amenities in both towns.

Further details regarding specific schedules and pricing can be found on the service provider's website.
